view.title: Domeni {hostname}
view.editWhoisPrivacy: Sinthani Mkhalidwe wa Chinsinsi cha Whois
view.name: Dzina:
view.allGoodNoErrors: Zonse zabwino! Palibe zolakwika mu zambiri za kupezeka!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Muli ndi chitsimikiziro chokutumizira imelo yoyambirira?
view.welcomeEmailResent: Imelo yoyambirira yatumizidwanso. Onani inbox yanu.

order.findDomain: Pezani domeni yanu ndikusanthula kuchezeka kwake.
order.premiumAvailable: Inde! Domeni yanu {domain} ilipo ndipo ndi domeni ya mtengo wapatali. Kulemba mwachiyambi kwachokelatu. Tumizirani imelo ku {email} ngati mukufuna kugula domeni iyi pa {cost} pachaka.
order.premiumTaken: Pepani! Domeni yanu {domain} yagwidwa kale! Mungili mwini wake? Mutha kuiyendetsa, ndipo ndi domeni ya mtengo wapatali. Kulemba mwachiyambi kwachokelatu. Tumizirani imelo ku {email} ngati mukufuna kugula domeni iyi pa {cost} pachaka.
order.available: Inde! Domeni yanu {domain} ilipo! Mutha kuilemba pa {cost}. Mtengo woyendetsa udzakhala {renewal}.
order.taken: Pepani! Domeni yanu {domain} yagwidwa kale! Mungili mwini wake? Mutha kuyiyendetsa pa {cost}. Mtengo woyendetsa udzakhala {renewal}.
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: Chilolezo chidzayendetsa mwachiyambi pambuyo pa chaka chilichonse pa {cost} mpaka chilekeredwe.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: Mwa kusanya bokosi ili, mukuvomera kuti mukugula chinthu cha chilolezo chomwe chidzayendetsa mwachiyambi (Malinga ndi Malamulo Olemba Pamwambapa) ndipo chidzalipiridwa pa khadi la krediti lomwe mupereka lero. Ngati mukufuna kuleka kuyendetsa mwachiyambi, mutha kulowa ku portalo ya kasitomala (Apa) kusankha utumiki woyenda ndikudina ulalo wa Leka kapena kutumiza imelo ku: billing{'@'}interserver.net kapena kugwiritsa ntchito njira ina yolemba mu Malamulo ndi Chikhalidwe. Mwa kusanya bokosi ndi kudina Ika Dongosolo Langa pansi, mukuvomera kuti mwawerenga, mumvetsa, ndipo muvomera Malamulo ndi Chikhalidwe athu ndi Mfundo ya Chinsinsi.
order.searchingDomain: Chonde dikireni! Kusakana dzina la domeni iyi.
order.loadingDomainFields: Chonde dikireni! Kutsitsa minda ya domeni.

nameservers.title: Maseva a Mayina a Domeni
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Maseva a mayina oponderezedwa agwiritsidwa ntchito. Dinani Yenjezerani kusungira.
nameservers.deleteConfirm: Muli pafupi kufufuta seva ya dzina ya domeni yanu.

eppCode.title: Tumizani Khodi ya EPP pa Imelo
eppCode.confirmMessage: Muli ndi chitsimikiziro chotumiza Khodi ya EPP ku imelo yolembedwa?

whois.title: Chinsinsi cha Whois
whois.renewalNote: Chinsinsi cha Whois chiyendetsedwa miyezi 12 iliyonse kuchokera pa tsiku loyambira. Mtengo woyendetsa wowonjezera wa Chinsinsi cha Whois ndi {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Chinsinsi cha Whois sichingathe kwa TLD iyi.
whois.currentlyEnabled: Chinsinsi cha Whois chayatsidwa pakhalipano cha {hostname}.
whois.disableAndCancel: Letsani ndi Lekani Chinsinsi cha Whois
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Chinsinsi cha Kupezeka chimasungirira wonzika wa Wolembetsa wina akafanya kusaka kwa WHOIS pa domeni ya Wolembetsa ameneyo.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: Ubwino wa kukhala ndi Chinsinsi cha Kupezeka ndiwo wonzika wa wolembetsa, kuphatikizapo adilesi yake ya nyumba, nambala ya foni, ndi adilesi ya imelo, yasungidwa ku ospamu, achifukwa a wonzika, ndi achinyengo.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: Wolembetsa ayatsa utumiki wa Chinsinsi cha Kupezeka, zambiri zosintha za kupezeka zimaonekera mu malo a WHOIS wonaokwa.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Chinsinsi cha kupezeka chinalipo pa {cost} pa domeni pachaka.
whois.enableNow: Kuyatsa Chinsinsi cha Kupezeka cha Domeni yanu, Ika Dongosolo Tsopano.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Mtengo wa Chinsinsi cha Whois: {cost} pachaka. Muli ndi chitsimikiziro choika dongosolo ili?
whois.orderSuccess: Dongosolo la Chinsinsi cha Whois yaikidwa bwino!
whois.enableMessage: Domeni yanu {hostname} ili ndi wowonjezera wa Chinsinsi cha Whois wolipidwa amene sanadayatsidwe. Mukufuna kuyatsa tsopano?
whois.disableTitle: Letsani ndi Lekani Chinsinsi cha Whois
whois.disableMessage: Wowonjezera wa Chinsinsi cha Whois wa domeni yanu {hostname} waletsedwa. Muli ndi chitsimikiziro choletsera ndi kuleka?
whois.whoisDisabled: Chinsinsi cha Whois chaletsedwa ndi kulekeredwa.

whoisToggle.title: Wowonjezera wa Chinsinsi cha Whois
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Wowonjezera wa Chinsinsi cha Whois wa domeni yanu {domain} Wayatsidwa
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Wowonjezera wa Chinsinsi cha Whois wa domeni yanu {domain} Waletsedwa
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Muli ndi chitsimikiziro choletsera ndi kuleka?

dnssec.title: Zambiri za DNSSEC
dnssec.unableToParse: Nthawi zake sichingawerenge mtundu wa zolemba za DS.
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: Izi zidzachotsa zolemba zonse za DNSSEC za domeni iyi.
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Chonde uzani zolemba zina mosanthe za DNSSEC.

renew.title: Yendetsa
renew.tip1: Domeni iyenera kuyendetsa pa tsiku lake la kumalizika kapena lisanadutse.
renew.tip2: Domeni ikamalizika, ingakhale ndi nthawi yachifundo kuchokera pa tsiku la kumalizika kuyendetsa.
renew.tip3: Yatsani Chinsinsi cha Whois kusungirira Zambiri zanu za Kupezeka wina akafanya kusaka kwa WHOIS pa domeni ya Wolembetsa ameneyo.
renew.payExistingInvoice: Kuyendetsa domeni yanu, chonde lipirani fatura yalipo.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Mtengo wonse: {cost}. Muli ndi chitsimikiziro choika dongosolo ili loyendetsa?
renew.renewalOrderSuccess: Dongosolo la kuyendetsa domeni yaikidwa bwino!
